name: Apple Noodle Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix noodles with 1/2 stick margarine until coated.
2. Add egg whites, sugar, apple pie filling, lemon juice, raisins, and walnuts to the noodles. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
3. Spread mixture in a greased baking dish. Top with remaining melted margarine.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar evenly over the top of the kugel.
5. Sprinkle additional chopped walnuts on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour in a 9 x 13 inch pan.
-----TOPPING-----
1/2 Stick margarine, melted
3/4 tsp Cinnamon
1 1/2 tbsp Sugar
1/2 cup Walnuts
